'''âm-n-s-j''' ('''kamansejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phosphate|phosphate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-s-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phosphate|phosphate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-n-s-j
|-
! Lemma
| kamansejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimansejoko|thimansejoko]] || [[word:jimansejoko|jimansejoko]] || [[word:shimansejoko|shimansejoko]] || [[word:kimansejoko|kimansejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumansejoko|thuthumansejoko]] || [[word:jujumansejoko|jujumansejoko]] || [[word:shushumansejoko|shushumansejoko]] || [[word:kukumansejoko|kukumansejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomansejoko|thomansejoko]] || [[word:jomansejoko|jomansejoko]] || [[word:shomansejoko|shomansejoko]] || [[word:komansejoko|komansejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamansejoko|thamansejoko]] || [[word:jamansejoko|jamansejoko]] || [[word:shamansejoko|shamansejoko]] || [[word:kamansejoko|kamansejoko]]
